title: nephrodium sphaerocarpon
intro: Nephrodium sphaerocarpon, also known as the Round-leaved Fern, is a species of fern in the family Matoniaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of the world, particularly in Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Nephrodium sphaerocarpon include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to create teas, tonics, and creams for topical application.
